name: Template Episode
summary: A template showing the structure of an Underleaf episode. Replace this summary with a one-paragraph public hook for the actual episode. No spoilers in this field.
hooks: A way the PCs might end up in this scene.
Another way the PCs might end up in this scene.
If your episode is the campaign opener, in-medias-res convention applies: the PCs are already together when the curtain rises.
inGameDate: use a real or rough date — helps the AI prompt-bar reason about what is documented when
